meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Scaling Issues
content.seo_description: Overcome scaling bottlenecks as a freelancer. Use this intermediate checklist featuring Antigravity and Claude Code to automate design and accelerate delivery.
content.answer_block: To scale as a freelancer, move from manual crafting to AI-orchestrated design systems. By integrating Antigravity for UI scaffolding and Claude Code for logic implementation, you transform repetitive coding tasks into automated workflows, allowing you to ship high-quality, production-ready SaaS projects in a fraction of the time.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'Freelancer’s Paradox': the more successful you become, the less time you have to actually build. You’re drowning in boilerplate, fighting design debt, and watching your profit margins evaporate as you manually stitch together components for every new client project. It’s not a talent problem; it’s a leverage problem.

True scaling doesn't come from working faster—it comes from shifting your role from coder to architect. By leveraging AI-native tools, you can codify your design patterns and delegate the heavy lifting to intelligent agents. This is the blueprint to reclaiming your time and delivering professional-grade software at scale.

steps.title: Define Your Design System Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, formalize your design language. Use Antigravity to ingest your existing design tokens so the AI understands your specific aesthetic and component constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my existing UI library. Extract all typography, spacing, and color tokens into a structured JSON theme file compatible with Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/tokens && claude write 'Generate a theme.js file based on these tokens'

steps.title: Automate Component Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop building buttons and inputs from scratch. Use AI to generate standardized, accessible components that adhere to your newly created design system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable PrimaryButton component in React with TypeScript, incorporating variants for size and state, ensuring full accessibility compliance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create components/ui/Button.tsx using the theme.js definitions'

steps.title: Architect Logic with Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Connect your frontend to backend logic using Claude Code to ensure the AI understands the full schema of your database and API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the user authentication flow to our Supabase schema. Ensure the UI updates state based on the auth provider response.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm run build' && claude fix

steps.title: Implement Rapid Feature Iteration
steps.description: Use iterative prompts to add complex features like dashboards or data tables, allowing the AI to manage the boilerplate while you review the architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive data table component that fetches from the 'projects' table, including filtering, sorting, and pagination logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the ProjectsTable component with real-time data binding'

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Deploy AI-driven testing to catch regressions before they reach the client, ensuring your scalable code remains robust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the primary navigation and auth components using Vitest, focusing on edge cases in user state management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate and run vitest specs for /components/auth'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'context.md' file in your root directory; it acts as the source of truth for Claude Code to maintain consistency across sessions.
Use Antigravity to generate 'mock data' factories that match your production database schema exactly, ensuring your UI looks real during development.
When Claude Code gets stuck, ask it to 'explain its reasoning' before suggesting a fix to prevent hallucinated architectural patterns.
Create a 'prompt library' of your most successful Antigravity commands to standardize your output across different client projects.
Use the 'diff' mode in Claude Code to review every AI-suggested change; never blindly accept large file refactors without verification.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, integrate your new component library into a private GitHub repository to serve as a 'Starter Kit' for all future client projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop manual labor and start building like a principal engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Stop building buttons and inputs from scratch. Use AI to generate standardized, accessible components that adhere to your newly created design system.
Connect your frontend to backend logic using Claude Code to ensure the AI understands the full schema of your database and API endpoints.
